name: Meng Po

visual_attributes.morphology: Elderly woman with a gentle demeanor
distinctive_features: Carries a bowl or ladle for serving soup
Has an aura of wisdom and serenity
visual_attributes.structural_arrangement: Typically depicted standing or sitting by a bridge

functional_attributes.primary_function: Induces forgetfulness in souls before reincarnation
secondary_functions: Guides souls across the Bridge of Oblivion

relationships.description: Operates in the realm of the dead, specifically in the 10th court
Some myths suggest Meng Po is the reincarnation of Lady Meng Jiang

contextual_attributes.cultural_significance: Symbolizes the cleansing of past burdens for reincarnation

contrastive_constraints: NOT without a bowl or ladle
NOT a Western depiction of a goddess
